title: Smooth platform-wide developer & visitor DX
description:
Unified navigation via beskid-hub, legacy redirects, multi-service hosting model (site, auth, tracker, nexus, pckg), shared observability, and Coolify guidance so every Beskid web surface feels consistent.

## Provenance
- **Catalog cutoff:** [`aaddd32`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/aaddd32) → [`ee88edf`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/ee88edf) on **beskid** (2026-05-26 – 2026-06-07)
- **Anchor commit:** [`1e73032`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/1e73032)

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4 (Platform services, auth, and delivery tooling)
- **Status:** Partial — hub, redirects, hosting model, auth autopairing, observability, and package sync landed; OAuth production docs + `@beskid/ui-react` GitHub Packages publish + Coolify deploy matrix docs backlog
- **Workstreams:** `web-auth-web-common`, `platform-docs-dx`, `platform-infra`
